Palette.rationale: Skip-link fix is present on current main (main-content target + tabIndex), but repeated Palette PRs also include button/focus/disabled-state polish that was generated in many variants and is not fully audited in this cleanup pass.

Sentinel.rationale: CORS restrictions, security headers, and API Field validations are present on current main. XSS escaping and/or rate limiting markers are not consistently detectable across the codebase, so remaining Sentinel PRs are treated as stale duplicates with candidate follow-up review notes.

Bolt.rationale: Current main contains several Bolt-style optimizations (OrderedDict memory manager and async gather patterns), but the repeated KB/prioritization/gzip variants are not uniformly present and are not merged in this cleanup pass.

NLP.rationale: Current NLP module exposes sentiment and entity extraction methods and contains AsyncOpenAI integration markers; topic-classification/summarization variants were repeatedly generated and are archived as intent, not merged now.

Solana/Ethereum.rationale: Current main includes AsyncWeb3 and Solana reward distribution markers, but not all staking/transfer variants are confirmed present. Treat as archived intent plus follow-up candidates.

Event Pipeline / Integrations.rationale: This cluster contains broader feature/integration work (event pipeline, APIs, infra hooks) not safely reducible to repeated micro-fixes. Archive intent and re-scope as explicit follow-up tasks if needed.

Other.rationale: Miscellaneous one-off bot branches are archived for intent and closed/deleted as stale during this cleanup pass.

followUpCandidates.reason: No high-confidence rate-limit middleware marker detected in current backend files.
No high-confidence heapq KB optimization marker detected in current knowledge base module.
No high-confidence stake_tokens method marker detected in current Solana contract manager.

followUpCandidates.topic: Re-scope integration PRs into tracked tasks
followUpCandidates.reason: Substantive multi-file feature work should be triaged intentionally, not merged from stale bot branches.
